channel.title: LLM Timeline — Barcelona Supercomputing Center Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Barcelona Supercomputing Center.

image.title: LLM Timeline — Barcelona Supercomputing Center Models

item.title: Salamandra (Barcelona Supercomputing Center)
item.description: Parameters: Salamandra License: open Type: model "The final [pre-training] dataset is composed of 55.51% FineWeb-Edu, 25.32% Colossal Oscar, 8.38% Wikipedia, 7.17% Aya Collection, and 3.63% StarCoder, totalling 315 billion tokens."
